# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1beta1  # version of the api (should match with kubernetes)
kind: KongAPI   # kind defines what resource this config file represents ('Kong' is a name for Kubernets service type, 'APIs', in case we use more than one API Gateway like Zuul or Keycloak). 
metadata:    # metadata about the api. Including namespace and other details if required by your setup (like labels)
   name: kong-api      # Name of this resource ('kong' is a Kubernetes service type, 'API', in case we use more than one API Gateway like Zuul or Keycloak). 
specs:   
 - hosts:     # Array to hold the hostnames for which Kong will serve as upstream. In this example it serves all microservices endpoints from our platform (like /api/v1, /auth)  
   paths: ['/{path}']
